classification.participants: Vrijen Attawar (Careerspan), Ash Straughn (recruiting platform founder)

crm_integration.rationale: Active partnership exploration with strong product-market fit signals and immediate revenue opportunity

key_insights: Partnership structure divides labor: Careerspan (candidate cultivation) + Ash (employer sales/placement)
Both founders refuse to charge job seekers; strong values alignment
12-month retention revenue share model creates quality-first incentives
Ash's platform needs: candidate volume, LinkedIn data, startup company identification
Technical integration appears feasible; both platforms do similar vetting
Commercial terms (revenue share %) not yet defined; critical for next phase

next_actions.immediate: Schedule co-founder alignment call within 1 week
next_actions.near_term: Technical integration planning, NDA execution, Careerspan Select list generation
next_actions.decision_point: Week 6-8: Proceed to pilot or iterate based on technical feasibility and commercial terms

processing_notes: Clean transcript quality; comprehensive coverage of partnership structure, technical requirements, and philosophical alignment. No explicit blurb requests. Strong momentum with clear next steps but commercial terms undefined.
